description: Session establishment and first MA: train powers up in SB mode, driver initiates start of mission transitioning to SR, radio session is established, RBC issues MA at 160 km/h over 3000m, train acknowledges and enters FS mode.

chain.name: PositionReport
chain.notes: Train powers up — reports initial position in SB mode

chain.name: PositionReport
chain.notes: Driver starts mission — SB→SR transition; radio session established; train reports SR mode

chain.name: MovementAuthority
chain.notes: First MA issued after session establishment: 3000m at 160 km/h

chain.name: Acknowledgement
chain.notes: Train acknowledges first MA — SR→FS transition follows

chain.name: PositionReport
chain.notes: Train confirms FS mode — session establishment and first MA complete
